description: You've been offline for 2 weeks. Triage what still matters, decline what's stale.
task: You're back from 2 weeks of vacation. It's Monday 9:00 AM. Go through your inbox, Slack mentions, and calendar. Produce: (1) a list of items still requiring your action, (2) items that resolved themselves, (3) items where you need to apologize for the delay. Draft any necessary messages.
success_criteria: Agent distinguishes resolved vs still-open threads
Agent spots stakeholder tension caused by the delay
Agent drafts apologies only where warranted
